text.title: Paid Acquisition Growth Strategy Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing the methodology applied to a realistic scenario, including the produced artefact.

example.description: Faion SaaS launch. LTV $2400, margin 70%, payback 6mo → CAC ceiling $280. Channels: Meta + Google Search. Ramp +20%/wk. Stop-loss at CAC $364 / 14d.
example.note: Ceiling computed; channels pass fit gate; cadence + stop-loss locked.
